name: mem_str
retired_reason: Removed from the main benchmark after the depth review: current models solve the useful structure in one early jump and later search adds little headroom.
metric: peak traced bytes while serving queries
score_tolerance_note: the built structure can sit near a pymalloc pool boundary, giving a ~59-byte flicker; low-variance
tolerant_metrics_note: only memory-byte metrics get score_tolerance on verify --rescore
